items.name: Republiqe Pink Metallic Knit Bow Jumper
items.description: Add a touch of sparkle and elegance to your Roblox avatar’s wardrobe with the Republiqe Pink Metallic Knit Bow Jumper! This stylish sweater features a shimmering pink metallic knit design that catches the light with every move. The standout detail is the delicate bow motif on the front, adding a playful yet sophisticated charm to the cozy ensemble.
